{"society_power": 6.0, "state_power": 6.5, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "Ib\u00e1\u00f1ez dictatorship, Depression collapse, then constitutional restoration and Popular Front", "reasoning": "The decade's whipsaw\u2014Ib\u00e1\u00f1ez's coercive state-building and repression, then the Depression-driven fiscal collapse and his 1931 fall to mass protest, then Alessandri's constitutional restoration alongside renewed labor repression\u2014left state capacity net slightly weaker due to commodity-fueled fiscal fragility despite the professionalized Carabineros. Society showed strong intermittent mobilization (guild strikes, new Socialist Party, Popular Front) but was repeatedly repressed, netting roughly flat."}
